taskSummary: Remove markdownlint editor warnings/errors from markdown files outside .agents.

acceptanceCriteria: Markdown files outside .agents show zero markdownlint warnings/errors in the editor.
No markdownlint-disabling config hack is introduced.
The code-style guide content remains intact while duplicate headings become unique.
constraints: Fix markdown content instead of disabling markdownlint rules.

plan.summary: Rename duplicate headings in docs/developers/CODE_STYLE_GUIDES.md to unique descriptive headings, then recheck editor markdownlint diagnostics.

qualityGates.lastRunSummary: Editor diagnostics returned zero markdownlint warnings/errors for markdown files outside .agents, and no markdownlint config files were added.

delivery.notes: Ready for user review. Markdown files outside .agents now show zero markdownlint warnings/errors in the editor without disabling markdownlint rules.
